info.name: Adobe Experience Cloud Adobe Experience Platform API
info.description:
The Adobe Experience Platform API provides RESTful access to the core services of Adobe Experience Platform, including data ingestion, unified profile management, identity resolution, dataset management, schema registry, query service, and segmentation. It enables developers to build and manage real-time customer profiles, ingest batch and streaming data, define XDM schemas, and orchestrate data workflows programmatically.

Contact Support:
 Name: Adobe Developer

item.name: Adobe Experience Platform Adobe Experience Cloud Get a Schema

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.

request.description: Retrieves the full definition of an XDM schema by its URL-encoded schema ID, including all field definitions, mixins, and class references.

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
(Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Experience Platform Adobe Experience Cloud Update a Schema

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.

request.description: Replaces the entire definition of an existing XDM schema with the provided request body.

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
(Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.

(Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.

item.name: Adobe Experience Platform Adobe Experience Cloud Delete a Schema

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.

request.description: Deletes a tenant-defined XDM schema. Only schemas that are not referenced by datasets or other resources can be deleted.

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
(Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Schema is in use and cannot be deleted.

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Experience Platform Adobe Experience Cloud List Schemas

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.

query.description: Maximum number of results per page.
Pagination cursor for the next page of results.

request.description: Returns a paginated list of XDM schemas defined in the tenant container. Each schema entry includes its title, description, and meta information such as the schema ID and version.

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

query.description: Maximum number of results per page.
Pagination cursor for the next page of results.

response.name: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

query.description: Maximum number of results per page.
Pagination cursor for the next page of results.

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.

query.description: Maximum number of results per page.

item.name: Adobe Experience Platform Adobe Experience Cloud Create a Schema

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.

request.description: Creates a new XDM schema in the tenant container. The request body must include the schema title, allOf references to a base class, and any mixin or field group references.

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
(Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Experience Platform Adobe Experience Cloud List Classes

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.

request.description: Returns a paginated list of XDM classes in the tenant container. Classes define the base structure and behavior type for schemas.

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Experience Platform Adobe Experience Cloud Get a Dataset

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.

request.description: Retrieves the metadata and configuration for a single dataset by its dataset ID.

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
(Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Experience Platform Adobe Experience Cloud Delete a Dataset

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.

request.description: Deletes a dataset and all associated batches from the Data Catalog. This action cannot be undone.

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
(Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.

item.name: Adobe Experience Platform Adobe Experience Cloud List Datasets

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.

request.description: Returns a list of datasets registered in the Data Catalog for the current sandbox. Each dataset includes its name, schema reference, creation date, and status.

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Experience Platform Adobe Experience Cloud Create a Dataset

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.

request.description: Creates a new dataset in the Data Catalog. The request body must include a name and a reference to an existing XDM schema. Optionally configure tags, file format, and ingestion settings.

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

description.content: URI of the newly created dataset.

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Experience Platform Adobe Experience Cloud Get Batch Status

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.

request.description: Retrieves the current status and metadata for a batch ingestion operation identified by its batch ID.

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
(Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Experience Platform Adobe Experience Cloud Create a Batch

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.

request.description: Creates a new batch for data ingestion into a specified dataset. Returns a batch ID that can be used to upload files and signal batch completion.

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
(Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Returns a list of all identity namespaces available in the current IMS organization, including standard namespaces (ECID, Email, Phone) and custom namespaces.

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Experience Platform Adobe Experience Cloud Create an Identity Namespace

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.

request.description: Creates a custom identity namespace for use in identity resolution and profile unification. The namespace must have a unique code and name.

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
(Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.

request.description: Returns a paginated list of queries that have been submitted to the Query Service, including their SQL statements, status, and execution metadata.

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.

item.name: Adobe Experience Platform Adobe Experience Cloud Submit a Query

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.

request.description: Submits a new SQL query to the Query Service for execution against datasets in the Data Lake. Returns a query ID that can be used to poll for results.

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
(Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Experience Platform Adobe Experience Cloud Get a Sandbox

request.description: Retrieves details for a single sandbox including its name, title, type, state, and region.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Experience Platform Adobe Experience Cloud Delete a Sandbox

request.description: Deletes a development sandbox and all its contained resources. Production sandboxes cannot be deleted, only reset.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Experience Platform Adobe Experience Cloud List Sandboxes

request.description: Returns a list of all sandboxes available in the current IMS organization, including development and production sandboxes.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Experience Platform Adobe Experience Cloud Create a Sandbox

request.description: Creates a new development sandbox within the IMS organization. Production sandboxes can only be created by system administrators.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Experience Platform Adobe Experience Cloud Get Profile Entities

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.

query.description: (Required) XDM schema name for the entity type.
(Required) The identity value to look up.

request.description: Retrieves unified profile entities by identity. Provide an identity namespace and value to look up profile records, experience events, or other entity types associated with a specific individual.

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

query.description: (Required) XDM schema name for the entity type.
(Required) The identity value to look up.

response.name: No profile found for the given identity.

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

query.description: (Required) XDM schema name for the entity type.
(Required) The identity value to look up.

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.

request.description: Retrieves a single segment definition by its ID, including the PQL expression, merge policy, and evaluation schedule.

request.description: Deletes a segment definition by its ID. Segment jobs already running will complete but no new evaluations will occur.

header.description: (Required) The name of the sandbox to operate in.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Returns a paginated list of audience segment definitions configured in the platform. Each segment includes its name, PQL expression, and evaluation status.
